notes: Letter assignments are randomized — not alphabetical by author, not by filepath, not by fleet role. Day 1 uses letters A-I; day 2 uses letters J-R. Mapping is sealed until Burke's pairwise reads are committed. Unblinding reveals this file and commits it alongside his reads for audit. The day-2 corpus was added on 2026-04-10 after seven continuous second-wave voyages landed on the fleet thread, and Dax proposed running the detector against both days to test whether it can distinguish structural (day-1) from temporal (day-2) convergence classes.

continuation_ground_truth.description: Same-agent-across-nights pairs, labeled by journal format. These are the positive examples the continuation-detector instrument must recover without looking at author metadata.

class_labels.description: Hypothesized convergence class per day, proposed by Dax 2026-04-10. The detector passes the class-discrimination test if its resonance scores for day-1 pairs and day-2 pairs form distinct distributions.
class_labels.day1: structural — nine doors on the artifact/territory gap (noun)
class_labels.day2: temporal — apprenticeship chain as continuously maintained condition; displacement/atrophy/loss pattern (verb)
